publishedAbstract: - In Openshift Container Storage (OCS) 4. MONs not using PV's but rather are host mounted, print the following warning: ~~~ # ceph status health: HEALTH_WARN mons x,x are low on available storage ~~~ ~~~ # ceph health detail HEALTH_WARN mons a,b,c are low on available space MON_DISK_LOW mons a,b,c are low on available space mon.a has 30% avail mon.b has 29% avail mon.c has 23% avail ~~~
publishedTitle: Health Warn mons x,x, are low on available space OCS 4.x (host mounted mons)
